content:
✨ awesome-android-root | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a centralized, curated, and easily navigable resource for discovering and learning about Android rooting tools, modules, and guides.
✨ Key Features: • Curated list of 500+ root apps and modules • Support for Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed (Xposed)
📖 Summary: Awesome Android Root is a comprehensive resource hub for Android rooting enthusiasts. It curates over 500 top root apps, Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed modules, along with detailed rooting guides for various devices. The repository aims to be the ultimate destination for discovering and managing tools and information related to rooting Android devices.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
